## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for any behavioural change
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, rustdoc, or design doc under `docs/`)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` ran and produced no changes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] If this is a performance-sensitive change, a Criterion benchmark was run locally and numbers are included in the PR description
- [ ] If this touches a T1–T5 path, the theorem gate was considered and docs/THEOREMS.md was updated if needed
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in the PR description and, if user-visible, in `docs/` or README
